text: Standing in this modern environment, I sense the presence of human creativity and ingenuity in every detail. The glass walls invite open contemplation, while the fire safety sign serves as a reminder of our vulnerability and need for precaution. Moving into the exhibition space, the bold colors and technological displays excite me—I feel drawn into an intellectual playground. This place ignites curiosity. I am reminded that knowledge advances through both collaborative effort and personal reflection, and here, the boundaries between thinker and space seem to blur. I feel alert and inspired, eager to learn and question.
